item.title: A message from Ms. Brennan:
item.description: There will be a short meeting Wednesday at the start of lunch in 201 for all Garden club members regarding upcoming activities.

item.title: A message from: Mrs. Longval:
item.description: Reminding ALL CrossFit Team Athletes - we have practice today afterschool

item.title: A message from Mrs. Longval:
item.description: ALL Students in grades 9-12 interested in competing on the Varsity Track and Field Team are asked to SIGN UP on the sheets outside Mr. Longval's office. Running, jumping, throwing and relays - there is an event for everyone! Please stop by the weight room at lunch this week to chat with Mrs. Longval if you have any questions. TEAM meeting for all interested Track and Filed athletes will take place next Monday at lunch!

item.title: A message from Mrs. Longval:
item.description: Weight Room is open today, Wednesday, Thursday for ladies and Friday at lunch. Drop by to chat with Mrs. Longval if you have any questions.
